pr.title: fix(editor): purge bank event refs when deleting events
pr.body: ## Bug and impact Deleting an event from the Events browser removed the node from the tree but left its id in every `CodaBank.event_ids` entry. Banks then showed incorrect membership counts, `validate_bank` reported missing events, and `build_manifest` silently skipped deleted events on export—producing incomplete `.coda_bank` files without a hard failure. **Trigger:** Add an event to a bank, delete the event from the tree, export or inspect the bank. ## Root cause `CodaState.delete_node` only called `events_root.remove_child_by_id` and never updated bank membership. ## Fix Before removal, collect all event ids in the deleted subtree (including events inside a deleted folder) and remove them from every bank via `_purge_event_ids_from_banks`. ## Validation - Added `_test_delete_event_clears_banks` in `test_editor_shell.gd`. - Logic reviewed against `CodaBankExport.build_manifest` (skips null events) and `validate_bank` (reports missing ids).
pr.author: cursor[bot]
